compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Forward/backward-safe DSL evolution consistent with the store's replay model.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Read-time chained vN->v(N+1) up-conversion shim (never in-place rewrite); lossless round-trip test per shim.
- [ ] schema_version newer than the running rebar is a hard "upgrade rebar" error.
- [ ] One immutable version-pinned JSON Schema per version at a stable $id (additionalProperties:false).
Files: src/rebar/llm/workflow/migrate.py, src/rebar/schemas/
compiled_state.title: WS-B3: schema_version migration shim + per-version immutable schemas
